prophecies.q: 以诺书 1:9 —— 上帝降临审判
prophecies.a: 看哪，主带着他的千万圣者降临，要在众人身上施行审判，定一切不敬虔之人的罪，因他们行事不敬虔，又因不敬虔的罪人所说的一切刚愎话。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 1:9 — God's Coming in Judgment
prophecies.a_en: Behold, He comes with ten thousands of His holy ones, to execute judgment upon all, and to convict all the ungodly of all their works of ungodliness which they have committed, and of all the hard things which ungodly sinners have spoken against Him.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 6-7章 —— 守望者堕落
prophecies.a: 当人类的女儿生得美丽之时，天使——天之子——见了她们就起了欲念。他们彼此说：来吧，让我们在人类的女儿中为自己选择妻子。他们的首领塞米亚扎说：我怕只有我一人敢做此事而独担重罪。于是有二百天使降落到赫尔蒙山顶，他们互相起誓。他们与人类女子结合，教导她们巫术与咒语。那些女子怀孕，生下巨人。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 6-7 — The Fall of the Watchers
prophecies.a_en: When the daughters of men had grown beautiful, the angels, the sons of heaven, saw and lusted after them. They said to one another: Come, let us choose wives from among the daughters of men. Their leader Semyaza said: I fear that I alone shall be guilty of a great sin. So two hundred angels descended upon Mount Hermon, and they bound themselves by oath. They took wives from among humans and taught them sorcery and enchantments. The women became pregnant and bore giants.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 8章 —— 阿撒泻勒传授禁忌知识
prophecies.a: 阿撒泻勒教导人类制造刀剑、盾牌、胸甲和金属器具，又教导他们手镯和饰物的工艺、锑粉的使用和眼影的涂抹，以及各种宝石和染料。于是世上出现了极大的不敬虔和淫乱，人类走上歧途，在一切道路上败坏了自己。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 8 — Azazel Teaches Forbidden Knowledge
prophecies.a_en: Azazel taught men to make swords, shields, and breastplates, and showed them metals and the art of working them; and bracelets and ornaments, and the use of antimony and the beautifying of eyelids, and all kinds of precious stones and dyes. And there was great impiety and much fornication, and they went astray and all their ways became corrupt.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 10:4-6 —— 阿撒泻勒被囚禁于荒漠
prophecies.a: 主对拉斐尔说：捆绑阿撒泻勒的手和脚，把他扔进黑暗中。在杜达埃勒的旷野凿开一个洞，把他丢在里面。在他身上放满尖锐的石头，用黑暗覆盖他，让他永远住在那里，遮蔽他的面，使他见不到光。到审判的大日，他将被投入火中。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 10:4-6 — Azazel Bound in the Wilderness
prophecies.a_en: The Lord said to Raphael: Bind Azazel hand and foot and cast him into the darkness. Make an opening in the wilderness of Dudael, and cast him therein. Place upon him rough and jagged stones, and cover him with darkness. Let him dwell there forever, cover his face that he may not see light. On the great day of judgment he shall be cast into the fire.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 10:16-22 —— 净化大地与未来乐园
prophecies.a: 净化大地脱离一切压迫、不义、罪恶和不敬虔，除去地上一切的不洁。那时义人将种植公义的树木，葡萄园结出丰盛的果实。在那些日子里，地上所有的人都是义人，都将敬拜赞美我。整个大地将被种上公义的树木，满是祝福。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 10:16-22 — Purification of the Earth and Future Paradise
prophecies.a_en: Cleanse the earth from all oppression, injustice, sin, and ungodliness, and remove all uncleanness upon the earth. Then the righteous shall plant trees of righteousness, and the vine shall yield fruit in abundance. In those days all people on earth shall be righteous and worship and praise Me. The whole earth shall be planted with trees of righteousness, full of blessing.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 18-21章 —— 以诺游历宇宙深渊
prophecies.a: 我看见一个地方，那里没有天穹在上，也没有坚固的大地在下，是一片荒凉可怖之地。在那里我看见七颗星，如同燃烧的大山。天使对我说：这是那些违背了上帝诫命的星辰被囚之处，它们将被关在这里直到一万代的时间完满。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 18-21 — Enoch's Journey to the Cosmic Abyss
prophecies.a_en: I saw a place where there was no firmament of heaven above, nor firmly founded earth beneath — a desolate and terrible place. There I saw seven stars like great burning mountains. The angel said to me: This is the prison for the stars that transgressed God's command; they shall be bound here until ten thousand ages are fulfilled.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 22章 —— 死者灵魂的分隔等候
prophecies.a: 我看见一座大山，山中有四个深坑。天使拉斐尔对我说：这些深坑是为死者的灵魂所造，使他们在此聚集等候审判之日。义人的灵魂有光明的水泉；罪人的灵魂则安置在黑暗之中，受大痛苦折磨，直到审判大日来到。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 22 — Separation of the Souls of the Dead
prophecies.a_en: I saw a great mountain with four hollows within it. The angel Raphael said to me: These hollows are made for the spirits of the dead, to gather them and await the day of judgment. The spirits of the righteous have a bright spring of water; the spirits of sinners are set apart in darkness, in great torment, until the great day of judgment.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 46章 —— 「人子」弥赛亚的显现
prophecies.a: 在那里我看见一位，他的头如白羊毛般洁白。与他同在的还有另一位，他的面容如同人的样貌，满有恩典，如同众圣天使。我问与我同行的天使关于那人子——他是谁，从何而来，为何与「万世之首」同行。他回答说：这就是那拥有公义的人子，公义与他同住；他将揭开一切隐藏的宝藏，因为万灵之主拣选了他。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 46 — The Appearance of the 'Son of Man' Messiah
prophecies.a_en: There I saw one whose head was white like wool. With him was another whose face had the appearance of a man, full of grace like the holy angels. I asked the angel who went with me about that Son of Man — who he was, whence he came, and why he went with the Head of Days. He answered: This is the Son of Man who has righteousness; righteousness dwells with him. He will reveal all hidden treasures, for the Lord of Spirits has chosen him.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 46:4-8 —— 人子审判列王
prophecies.a: 这位人子将把列王和权贵从他们安逸的座位上推下，把强者从他们的宝座上拉下来。他将使列王面红耳赤，用黑暗充满他们的住处。因为他们不尊崇万灵之主，不承认赐予他们王权的那一位。权贵和列王的面将充满羞耻，黑暗将成为他们的居所，虫将成为他们的床。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 46:4-8 — The Son of Man Judges Kings
prophecies.a_en: This Son of Man shall put down kings from their thrones and kingdoms, for they do not extol and praise the Lord of Spirits. He shall be a staff for the righteous to lean upon, and the light of the nations. He shall put down the countenance of the strong and fill them with shame. Darkness shall be their dwelling, and worms shall be their bed.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 48:2-7 —— 人子的名在创世之前已被拣选
prophecies.a: 在太阳和诸星座被造之前，在天上的星辰被造之前，他的名已在万灵之主面前被提及。他将成为义人的杖，使他们可以倚靠而不跌倒。他是万国之光，是那些心灵忧伤之人的盼望。凡住在地上的人都将俯伏敬拜他，赞美称颂万灵之主。为此，他在创世之前就被拣选，隐藏在上帝面前，直到永远。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 48:2-7 — The Son of Man Chosen Before Creation
prophecies.a_en: Before the sun and the constellations were created, before the stars of heaven were made, his name was mentioned before the Lord of Spirits. He shall be a staff for the righteous, that they may lean upon him and not fall. He is the light of the nations and the hope of those who are troubled in heart. All who dwell on earth shall worship him and bless the Lord of Spirits. For this purpose he was chosen and hidden before God before the creation of the world, and forevermore.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 51章 —— 义人复活与大地交还亡者
prophecies.a: 在那些日子里，大地将交还托付给她的一切，阴间也将归还她所领受的一切，地狱也将偿还她所欠的一切。他将从他们中间拣选义人和圣洁的人，因为他们得救赎的日子已经临近。被拣选者将在那些日子里坐在我的宝座上，他口中所出的一切奥秘智慧，将如泉涌一般，因为万灵之主将这一切赐给了他。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 51 — Resurrection of the Righteous
prophecies.a_en: In those days the earth shall give back that which has been entrusted to it, and Sheol shall give back that which it has received, and Hell shall return what it owes. He will choose the righteous and holy from among them, for the day of their redemption has drawn near. The Elect One shall sit on the throne in those days, and all secrets of wisdom shall flow from his mouth, for the Lord of Spirits has given them to him.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 54:1-6 —— 铁链锁链为堕天使预备
prophecies.a: 我又观看，转向大地的另一边，看见那里有一个很深的山谷，火焰在燃烧。他们带来了列王和权贵，将他们投入那深谷之中。在那里我亲眼看见，铁链被铸造——无比沉重的铁链。我问平安的天使说：这些锁链是为谁预备的？他对我说：这些是为阿撒泻勒的众军预备的，要捆绑他们，投入深渊之中。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 54:1-6 — Chains Prepared for the Fallen Angels
prophecies.a_en: I looked and turned to another part of the earth, and saw there a deep valley with burning fire. They brought the kings and mighty and cast them into that valley. There I saw how chains were being made — chains of immeasurable weight. I asked the angel of peace: For whom are these chains prepared? He said: These are prepared for the hosts of Azazel, to bind them and cast them into the abyss.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 72章 —— 太阳运行的律法与末世天象
prophecies.a: 太阳的律法之书：光的伟大发光体，其名叫太阳。太阳从东方天门升起，从西方天门落下。它有三十个天门从东方升起，三十个天门从西方落下。在末后的日子，月份将缩短，太阳运行的轨道将改变，光将不再按时到来。星辰的秩序将紊乱，违背自然规律运行。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 72 — Laws of the Sun and End-Times Celestial Signs
prophecies.a_en: The book of the laws of the sun: the great luminary whose name is the Sun. It rises in the eastern gates of heaven and sets in the western gates. It has thirty gates for rising in the east and thirty for setting in the west. In the last days, months shall be shortened, the orbit of the sun shall change, and light shall not come in its proper time. The order of the stars shall be disturbed, running contrary to their natural course.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 85-90章 —— 动物启示录：以色列历史与末世寓言
prophecies.a: 我在睡梦中看见异象。一头白色公牛从地里出来（亚当），又有一头母牛与它同来（夏娃）。一头黑色小牛和一头红色小牛从母牛而生。黑牛（该隐）用角顶红牛（亚伯）。此后群星从天坠落与母牛结合（堕天使），生出大象、骆驼和驴（巨人）。白牛（诺亚）建造了一艘大船。此后我看见绵羊（以色列民）被交给狼和狮子（列国），七十个牧人轮流牧放。在末了，一头大角白绵羊兴起（犹大·马加比），与野兽争战。上帝亲自降临，设立宝座施行审判。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 85-90 — Animal Apocalypse: Israel's History and End-Times Allegory
prophecies.a_en: I saw a vision in my sleep. A white bull came from the earth (Adam), and with it a heifer (Eve). A black calf and a red calf were born (Cain and Abel). The black one gored the red one. Stars fell from heaven and mated with the heifers (fallen angels), producing elephants, camels, and donkeys (giants). A white bull (Noah) built a great vessel. Then sheep (Israel) were given over to wolves and lions (nations), and seventy shepherds ruled in succession. At the end, a great-horned white sheep arose (Judas Maccabeus) and fought the beasts. God Himself descended, set up His throne, and executed judgment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 动物启示录以寓言形式编码了从创世到马加比起义（约公元前167-160年）的以色列历史，该段历史回顾部分高度吻合实际事件。但末世部分——上帝亲自降临施行最终审判、新耶路撒冷建立——并未在马加比时代实现，属于未应验的末世期盼。学术界普遍认为该段写于马加比起义期间，历史回顾部分是「事后预言」（vaticinium ex eventu）。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Animal Apocalypse encodes Israel's history from creation to the Maccabean revolt (c. 167-160 BCE) in allegorical form; the historical review portion closely matches actual events. However, the eschatological section — God descending to execute final judgment and establishing a new Jerusalem — was not realized in the Maccabean era, remaining an unfulfilled apocalyptic expectation. Scholars generally date this section to the Maccabean period, with the historical review being vaticinium ex eventu (prophecy after the fact).
prophecies.yearReason: 根据《以诺书》中的天文历法和末世预言推算
prophecies.yearReason_en: Derived from the astronomical calendar and eschatological prophecies in the Book of Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 91:12-17 —— 十周启示录：人类历史的十个时代
prophecies.a: 第一周，义在其中生长。第二周之后，不义将萌芽，罪人将在其中灭亡。第三周之末，一人将被拣选为公义之苗的根（亚伯拉罕）。第七周，一个背道的世代兴起。在其末了，被拣选的义人将从公义永恒之苗中被选出，他们将获得七倍的智慧与知识。第八周是义的一周，将赐给所有义人一把刀剑，他们对罪人执行公义审判。第九周，公义的审判将显明给全世界。第十周的第七部分，将有永恒的大审判。旧天将过去，新天将显现。此后将有无数的善与义之周，罪恶将永不再被提及。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 91:12-17 — Apocalypse of Weeks: Ten Ages of Human History
prophecies.a_en: In the first week, righteousness endures. After the second week, iniquity shall spring up and sinners shall perish. At the end of the third week, a man shall be chosen as the plant of righteous judgment (Abraham). In the seventh week, an apostate generation shall arise. At its close, the elect righteous from the eternal plant of righteousness shall be chosen, and they shall be given sevenfold wisdom and knowledge. The eighth week is one of righteousness, when a sword shall be given to the righteous to execute judgment on sinners. In the ninth week, righteous judgment shall be revealed to the whole world. In the seventh part of the tenth week, there shall be the great eternal judgment. The old heaven shall pass away, and a new heaven shall appear. After that, there shall be countless weeks of goodness and righteousness, and sin shall never again be mentioned.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 62章 —— 末日审判：权贵的恐惧与恳求
prophecies.a: 万灵之主命令人子坐在他荣耀的宝座上，公义之灵倾倒在他身上。他口中的话将杀死一切罪人。在那一天，列王和权贵以及一切占有大地的人，将看见那被拣选者坐在荣耀的宝座上。他们将认出他，但为时已晚。痛苦将如同临产的妇人抓住他们。他们将俯伏在他面前恳求怜悯，但万灵之主将把他们从自己面前驱逐。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 62 — Final Judgment: Terror and Plea of the Mighty
prophecies.a_en: The Lord of Spirits commanded the Son of Man to sit on the throne of His glory, and the spirit of righteousness was poured upon him. The word of his mouth shall slay all sinners. On that day, kings and the mighty and all who possess the earth shall see the Elect One sitting on the throne of glory. They shall recognize him, but too late. Pain shall seize them as a woman in labor. They shall fall on their faces before him begging for mercy, but the Lord of Spirits shall drive them from His presence.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 108章 —— 义人的永恒命运
prophecies.a: 我要从光明之中召唤那些生在黑暗中的灵魂——那些未因不信而获得荣耀的灵魂。那些爱我名的人，我将使他们坐在我荣耀宝座之上，他们将在无数的世代中发光。因为上帝的审判不偏待人。对那些信实之人，他将在光明中赐予信实的居所。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 108 — The Eternal Destiny of the Righteous
prophecies.a_en: I will bring forth those who were born in darkness but were not rewarded with glory in their faith. Those who love My name I will seat upon My throne of glory, and they shall shine for ages uncounted. For God's judgment is no respecter of persons. To those who are faithful, He will give a faithful dwelling in the light.

prophecies.q: 以诺书 8章 —— 守望者教导人类的禁忌知识
prophecies.a: 阿扎泽尔教导人类制造刀剑、盾牌和胸甲，又教他们开采金属和加工宝石。塞米亚扎教授咒语和草药知识。巴拉基耶尔教授占星术，科卡比耶尔教授星象学。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 8 — Forbidden knowledge taught by Watchers
prophecies.a_en: Azazel taught humans to make swords, shields, and breastplates, and to mine metals and work precious stones. Semyaza taught enchantments and herbalism. Barakiel taught astrology, and Kokabiel taught the constellations.
prophecies.yearReason: 神话叙事，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mythological narrative, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 10章 —— 天使审判守望者
prophecies.a: 上帝派遣大天使拉斐尔捆绑阿扎泽尔，将他投入黑暗之中。米迦勒将塞米亚扎和其他堕落天使捆绑七十代，直到审判日来临。他们将被投入火焰深渊，永远囚禁。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 10 — Angels judge the Watchers
prophecies.a_en: God sent Archangel Raphael to bind Azazel and cast him into darkness. Michael bound Semyaza and the other fallen angels for seventy generations until the Day of Judgment. They will be cast into the fiery abyss, imprisoned forever.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世审判，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times judgment, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 14章 —— 以诺升天见神
prophecies.a: 我被带入天上的宫殿。它的墙壁和地面都是水晶做的，天花板如同星星和闪电的路径。我看见一个伟大的宝座——火焰从它下面涌出。万千的天使站在它面前，但没有人能靠近。至高者坐在宝座上，他的荣光无人能直视。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 14 — Enoch ascends to see God
prophecies.a_en: I was brought into a heavenly palace. Its walls and floor were crystal; its ceiling was like the path of stars and lightning. I saw a great throne — flames poured from beneath it. Myriads of angels stood before it, but none could approach. The Most High sat upon the throne, and His glory no one could look upon directly.
prophecies.yearReason: 神视叙事，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Visionary narrative, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 22章 —— 死者灵魂的居所
prophecies.a: 以诺被带到一座高山内部的洞穴。天使拉斐尔解释：这里有四个隔间，分别存放义人、恶人、殉道者和普通人的灵魂。他们在此等待最终审判日的到来。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 22 — The abode of departed souls
prophecies.a_en: Enoch was brought to caverns inside a high mountain. Angel Raphael explained: there are four compartments here, holding the souls of the righteous, the wicked, the martyrs, and ordinary people separately. They wait here until the Final Judgment Day.
prophecies.yearReason: 来世描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Afterlife description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 24-25章 —— 生命之树
prophecies.a: 在七座山的中央有一棵芬芳的树。它的高度超过一切树木，果实如同葡萄串。米迦勒说：在审判之日，这棵树的果实将赐给义人。他们将享受长寿和快乐，疾病和苦难不再触及他们。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 24-25 — The Tree of Life
prophecies.a_en: In the center of seven mountains stood a fragrant tree. Its height surpassed all trees, its fruit like clusters of grapes. Michael said: on the day of judgment, this tree's fruit will be given to the righteous. They will enjoy long life and joy, and sickness and suffering will not touch them.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世许诺，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological promise, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 37-71章 —— 人子的预言
prophecies.a: 以诺在比喻篇中看见「人子」——一位被拣选的义者。他在创世之前就已存在，被隐藏在上帝面前。在末日，他将坐在荣耀的宝座上审判一切受造物。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 37-71 — Prophecy of the Son of Man
prophecies.a_en: In the Parables, Enoch saw the 'Son of Man' — a chosen righteous one. He existed before creation and was hidden before God. At the end of days, he will sit on a throne of glory and judge all creation.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世审判，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times judgment, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 56章 —— 帕提亚和米底人的入侵
prophecies.a: 在末日，帕提亚人和米底人将像狮子一样冲入羊群中。他们将踏上被拣选者的土地。但他们的行军将止于审判之城，在那里他们将被消灭。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 56 — Invasion of Parthians and Medes
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, the Parthians and Medes will rush like lions among sheep. They will march upon the land of the chosen ones. But their advance will halt at the city of judgment, where they will be destroyed.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世战争预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times war prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 62章 —— 君王和权贵的审判
prophecies.a: 当人子坐在荣耀宝座上时，地上的君王、权贵和土地的拥有者将看见他并认出他。恐惧将笼罩他们，痛苦将抓住他们。他们将被交给天使行刑，接受永恒的惩罚。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 62 — Judgment of kings and the mighty
prophecies.a_en: When the Son of Man sits on the throne of glory, the kings, the mighty, and the landowners of the earth will see and recognize him. Fear will cover them and pain will seize them. They will be handed over to the angels of punishment for eternal chastisement.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世审判，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times judgment, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 72-82章 —— 天文学之书
prophecies.a: 以诺记录了太阳和月亮的运行规律。太阳在十二道门中升起和落下，每月经过不同的门。一年有364天，分为四个季节。偏离这个历法就是罪。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 72-82 — The Astronomical Book
prophecies.a_en: Enoch recorded the movements of the sun and moon. The sun rises and sets through twelve gates, passing through different gates each month. A year has 364 days, divided into four seasons. Deviation from this calendar is sin.
prophecies.yearReason: 天文历法描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Astronomical calendar description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 83-90章 —— 动物异象
prophecies.a: 以诺在梦中看见一部以动物比喻的人类历史。白色公牛代表亚当，绵羊代表以色列人，猛兽代表压迫以色列的异族。在末日，一头带有巨角的白色公牛将出现——代表弥赛亚。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 83-90 — The Animal Apocalypse
prophecies.a_en: In a dream, Enoch saw human history told through animal metaphors. A white bull represents Adam, sheep represent Israelites, wild beasts represent nations oppressing Israel. At the end of days, a white bull with great horns will appear — representing the Messiah.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 91-93章 —— 十周异象
prophecies.a: 人类历史被分为十个「周」。前七个周已过去（从亚当到第二圣殿时期）。第八周将是义人执剑审判压迫者的时代；第九周将向全世界传播正义；第十周将是最终审判。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 91-93 — The Apocalypse of Weeks
prophecies.a_en: Human history is divided into ten 'weeks.' The first seven have passed (from Adam to the Second Temple period). The eighth week will be when the righteous wield the sword to judge oppressors; the ninth will spread justice worldwide; the tenth will be the Final Judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世历史分期，以诺书未设定精确时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological periodization, no precise dates in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 100-104章 —— 义人的安慰
prophecies.a: 义人不要恐惧。你们的名字被写在至高者面前。当你们死去时，天使将带走你们的灵魂进入光明。你们将像天上的星辰一样闪耀。而罪人将被投入黑暗和火焰之中。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 100-104 — Comfort for the righteous
prophecies.a_en: Fear not, you righteous ones. Your names are written before the Most High. When you die, angels will carry your souls into light. You will shine like the stars of heaven. But sinners will be cast into darkness and fire.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世许诺，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological promise, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 106-107章 —— 挪亚的诞生预言
prophecies.a: 当挪亚出生时，他的皮肤白如雪，红如玫瑰。他的头发如羊毛般洁白，眼睛像太阳一样明亮。他一出生就开口说话，赞美天上的主。拉麦恐惧地以为妻子与天使结合。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 106-107 — Prophecy of Noah's birth
prophecies.a_en: When Noah was born, his skin was white as snow and red as a rose. His hair was white as wool and his eyes bright as the sun. He spoke at birth, praising the Lord of heaven. Lamech feared his wife had conceived by an angel.
prophecies.yearReason: 神话叙事，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mythological narrative, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 15章 —— 对守望者的判词
prophecies.a: 你们本是灵性的存在，拥有永恒的生命，不需要女人。但你们放弃了自己的崇高地位，与人类的女儿结合，生下了肉体中的巨人。因此，他们的灵魂将成为恶灵，在大地上游荡，直到审判之日。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 15 — Judgment against the Watchers
prophecies.a_en: You were spiritual beings with eternal life, needing no women. But you abandoned your lofty station, united with human daughters, and begot giants in the flesh. Therefore, their spirits will become evil spirits, roaming the earth until the Day of Judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 神话审判叙事，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mythological judgment narrative, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 60章 —— 末世的自然灾害
prophecies.a: 在末日，雷电将更加猛烈，暴风雨将淹没大地。海洋将翻腾，山脉将崩塌。整个创造界都将在上帝的震怒中颤抖。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 60 — End-times natural disasters
prophecies.a_en: At the end of days, thunder and lightning will grow fiercer, storms will inundate the earth. Seas will churn, mountains will collapse. All creation will tremble in God's wrath.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 46章 —— 远古者与人子
prophecies.a: 我看见一位远古者，他的头发白如羊毛。与他同在的有另一位，面容如同人子，充满恩典。天使告诉我：这位人子将推翻君王的宝座，粉碎罪人的牙齿。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 46 — The Ancient of Days and Son of Man
prophecies.a_en: I saw an Ancient of Days whose hair was white as wool. With him was another whose countenance was like the Son of Man, full of grace. The angel told me: this Son of Man will overthrow the thrones of kings and crush the teeth of sinners.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世异象，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times vision, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 108章 —— 最后的劝诫
prophecies.a: 这是最后的话：那些行义之路的人将得到救恩。那些走在黑暗之路上的人将被毁灭。愿义人刚强壮胆，因为光明终将战胜黑暗，正义终将战胜邪恶。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 108 — Final exhortation
prophecies.a_en: These are the final words: those who walk the path of righteousness will receive salvation. Those who walk in darkness will be destroyed. Let the righteous be strong and courageous, for light will ultimately triumph over darkness, and justice over evil.
prophecies.yearReason: 灵性劝诫，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Spiritual exhortation, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 48章 —— 人子的名字在创世前被命名
prophecies.a: 在太阳和星辰被造之前，人子的名字就已在万灵之主面前被宣告。他将成为义人的权杖，让他们依靠站立。他是被隐藏者的光，外邦人的希望。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 48 — The Son of Man named before creation
prophecies.a_en: Before the sun and stars were made, the name of the Son of Man was pronounced before the Lord of Spirits. He will be a staff for the righteous to lean on. He is the light of the hidden ones, the hope of the Gentiles.
prophecies.yearReason: 神学宣告，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Theological proclamation, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 69章 —— 天使的秘密名字
prophecies.a: 以诺记录了堕落天使的秘密名字和他们各自教导人类的禁忌知识：佩内穆教导人类书写（因此带来了无尽的诉讼），卡斯德亚教导人类堕胎和避孕的方法。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 69 — Secret names of the angels
prophecies.a_en: Enoch recorded the secret names of fallen angels and the forbidden knowledge each taught humanity: Penemue taught humans writing (thus bringing endless lawsuits), Kasdeya taught methods of abortion and contraception.
prophecies.yearReason: 神话叙事，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Mythological narrative, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 51章 —— 大地交出死者
prophecies.a: 在那些日子里，大地将交出她所保管的。阴间将归还她所欠的。地狱将归还她所吞噬的。人子将从其中选出义人和圣者。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 51 — Earth yields up the dead
prophecies.a_en: In those days, the earth will yield what she has stored. Sheol will return what she owes. Hell will give back what she has swallowed. The Son of Man will select the righteous and holy from among them.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世复活预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times resurrection prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 90:13-19 —— 马加比起义
prophecies.a: 一只大角公羊从绵羊中站起来。它的角很大，打碎了乌鸦和秃鹰。绵羊们看到了它的力量，纷纷跟随它。牧羊人来帮助乌鸦，但那大角公羊和其他公羊与它们交战。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 90:13-19 — The Maccabean revolt
prophecies.a_en: A great-horned ram stood up from among the sheep. Its horn was great and it shattered the ravens and vultures. The sheep saw its strength and followed it. Shepherds came to help the ravens, but the great-horned ram and other rams fought against them.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 学者普遍认为「大角公羊」象征犹大·马加比。前167年安条克四世镇压犹太教引发马加比起义（前167-160年）。马加比成功夺回耶路撒冷圣殿并恢复犹太人的宗教自由。
prophecies.verdict_en: Scholars widely identify the 'great-horned ram' as Judas Maccabeus. Antiochus IV's suppression of Judaism in 167 BC triggered the Maccabean Revolt (167-160 BC). The Maccabees successfully recaptured the Jerusalem Temple and restored Jewish religious freedom.
prophecies.yearReason: 马加比起义的历史记录
prophecies.yearReason_en: Historical record of the Maccabean Revolt

prophecies.q: 以诺书 17-19章 —— 以诺的宇宙之旅
prophecies.a: 天使带领以诺周游宇宙：他看见了七座发光的山、燃烧的河流、囚禁堕落天使的深渊。在世界的尽头有一座混沌之城，那里既没有天空也没有大地，是虚空和恐怖的所在。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 17-19 — Enoch's cosmic journey
prophecies.a_en: Angels led Enoch on a cosmic tour: he saw seven luminous mountains, rivers of fire, and the abyss imprisoning fallen angels. At the world's edge stood a city of chaos, where there was neither sky nor earth — a place of void and terror.
prophecies.yearReason: 宇宙志描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Cosmographic description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 32章 —— 义人的乐园
prophecies.a: 以诺到达乐园，看见知识之树——它的果实像葡萄一样芬芳。天使长拉斐尔说：这就是你的祖先亚当和夏娃吃了果实后被驱逐的地方。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 32 — Paradise of the righteous
prophecies.a_en: Enoch reached Paradise and saw the Tree of Knowledge — its fruit fragrant like grapes. Archangel Raphael said: this is the place from which your ancestors Adam and Eve were expelled after eating the fruit.
prophecies.yearReason: 乐园描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Paradise description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 38章 —— 第一比喻：罪人的审判
prophecies.a: 当义者出现在罪人面前时，罪人将在他面前被逐出地面。君王和权贵将被赶下宝座。他们将无处可藏，因为天使不会接收他们，地也不会容纳他们。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 38 — First Parable: Judgment of sinners
prophecies.a_en: When the Righteous One appears before sinners, they will be driven from the face of the earth. Kings and mighty ones will be cast from their thrones. They will have nowhere to hide, for angels will not receive them nor will the earth shelter them.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世审判预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times judgment prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 41章 —— 天上的秘密
prophecies.a: 以诺看见了天上的仓库：雨和露水的仓库、风的仓库、冰雹的仓库。他看见太阳和月亮从何而来又到哪里去。他看见了闪电的源头和雷声的起因。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 41 — Secrets of heaven
prophecies.a_en: Enoch saw the heavenly storehouses: storehouses of rain and dew, of wind, of hail. He saw where the sun and moon come from and where they go. He saw the source of lightning and the cause of thunder.
prophecies.yearReason: 宇宙志描述，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Cosmographic description, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 54章 —— 地狱之谷
prophecies.a: 以诺看见一个深谷中燃烧着铁链和锁链。天使告诉他：这些是为阿扎泽尔的军队准备的。在审判之日，他们将被用这些锁链捆绑并投入火焰之中，永远不得释放。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 54 — The Valley of Hell
prophecies.a_en: Enoch saw chains of iron burning in a deep valley. Angels told him: these are prepared for Azazel's army. On the Day of Judgment, they will be bound with these chains and cast into flames, never to be released.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世审判描述，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times judgment description, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 58章 —— 义人将闪耀如光
prophecies.a: 义人将在天上的光中闪耀。他们将在永恒的生命中找到安息。黑暗将被消灭，光明将永无止境。因为在上帝面前，光明的日子是没有尽头的。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 58 — The righteous will shine like light
prophecies.a_en: The righteous will shine in heavenly light. They will find rest in eternal life. Darkness will be destroyed, and light will be without end. For before God, the days of light have no limit.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世许诺，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Eschatological promise, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 85-90章 —— 七十牧人的异象
prophecies.a: 上帝将以色列交给七十位天使牧人管理。每位牧人管理一个历史时期。但这些牧人渎职，允许比规定更多的羊被杀害。最终他们将因渎职而在审判日受到惩罚。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 85-90 — Vision of the Seventy Shepherds
prophecies.a_en: God entrusted Israel to seventy angelic shepherds. Each shepherd governed a historical period. But these shepherds failed in their duty, allowing more sheep to be killed than permitted. They will ultimately be punished for dereliction on the Day of Judgment.
prophecies.yearReason: 历史分期异象，以诺书未设定精确时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Historical periodization vision, no precise dates in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 90:28-36 —— 新耶路撒冷
prophecies.a: 旧的殿将被折叠收起，新的殿更大更高将被带来取代它。所有的柱子和装饰都是新的，比旧的更伟大。主人将在其中喜乐。所有被驱散的羊和走兽都将聚集在这新殿中。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 90:28-36 — The New Jerusalem
prophecies.a_en: The old house will be folded and carried away; a new and greater house will replace it. All its pillars and ornaments are new and grander. The Lord will rejoice within it. All scattered sheep and beasts will be gathered in this new house.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世异象，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times vision, no specific date in 1 Enoch

prophecies.q: 以诺书 94-99章 —— 对罪人的祸哉
prophecies.a: 你们这些罪人有祸了！你们以不义获取财富，说'我们已富足'。你们的财富不会持久，它将从你们手中飞走。你们在公义之日将被发现不配，将被交给永火的审判。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 94-99 — Woes against sinners
prophecies.a_en: Woe to you sinners! You gain wealth through injustice and say 'we are rich.' Your wealth will not endure; it will fly from your hands. On the day of justice you will be found unworthy and delivered to the judgment of eternal fire.
prophecies.yearReason: 道德劝诫，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Moral exhortation, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 103章 —— 义人灵魂的见证
prophecies.a: 我向你们起誓，义人们：天使在天上为你们的灵魂代求。你们的名字被写在荣耀之中。不要失去希望，因为你们将获得大喜乐，如同天上的天使一样。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 103 — Testimony of righteous souls
prophecies.a_en: I swear to you, righteous ones: angels in heaven intercede for your souls. Your names are written in glory. Do not lose hope, for you will receive great joy, like the angels of heaven.
prophecies.yearReason: 灵性劝诫，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Spiritual exhortation, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 71章 —— 以诺被认定为人子
prophecies.a: 天使长米迦勒带领以诺来到至高者面前。至高者对以诺说：你就是那位以义生的人子。义将与你同在直到永远。万民将祝福你。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 71 — Enoch identified as the Son of Man
prophecies.a_en: Archangel Michael brought Enoch before the Most High. The Most High said to Enoch: you are the Son of Man born in righteousness. Righteousness will dwell with you forever. All peoples will bless you.
prophecies.yearReason: 神学宣告，非时间预言
prophecies.yearReason_en: Theological proclamation, not a time-based prophecy

prophecies.q: 以诺书 80章 —— 末世的天象异变
prophecies.a: 在罪恶的日子里，年份将缩短，庄稼将延迟，土地将贫瘠。月亮将改变运行轨道，不在规定的时间出现。许多星辰将偏离正常路径。整个自然秩序将被扰乱。
prophecies.q_en: 1 Enoch 80 — End-times celestial disturbances
prophecies.a_en: In the days of sin, years will be shortened, crops delayed, and land barren. The moon will alter its orbit and not appear at proper times. Many stars will deviate from their normal paths. The entire natural order will be disturbed.
prophecies.yearReason: 末世预言，以诺书未设定具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: End-times prophecy, no specific date in 1 Enoch
